title: task
description: compact_cot.py:791-827 - _parse_xml_chat never sets dest_type=DIRECT or dest_iid. When XML with chatroom='0011223344556677' (a hex IID) is parsed, it doesn't match any team name, so it defaults to DestType.BROADCAST. Direct messages sent ATAK->mesh->ATAK lose their recipient. Failure scenario: User A sends direct message to User B via LICHEN mesh. User B receives it as a broadcast message visible to everyone instead of a private message.
close_reason: Already fixed: _parse_xml_chat now handles direct messages - checks for 16-char hex IID and sets dest_type=DIRECT + dest_iid (uncommitted change in working tree)
